lockpicks.name: Set of Lockpicks
lockpicks.description: For the right kind of work.

troll_tooth.name: Troll Tooth
troll_tooth.description: Proof of a slain troll. Useful for quests.

herb_bundle.name: Bundle of Herbs
herb_bundle.description: Healing herbs gathered in the forest.

old_map.name: Old Map
old_map.description: Faded ink hints at hidden ruins.

bogcap.name: Bogcap Mushroom
bogcap.description: A pale swamp mushroom; alchemists prize its bitterness.

wheat_sheaf.name: Wheat Sheaf
wheat_sheaf.description: A golden sheaf cut from a ripe field.

tome_of_fireball.name: Tome of Fireball
tome_of_fireball.description: Alzara's teaching copy — margins full of scorch marks.

royal_seal.name: Royal Seal of Bloodstone
royal_seal.description: A wax-and-silver seal that speaks with the King's own voice. Doors open for the one who bears it.

dukes_cipher.name: Duke Voss's Cipher
dukes_cipher.description: A folded cipher in the Duke's own hand — proof, if it can be read, of a plot against the heir.

game_hide.name: Game Hide
game_hide.description: The hide of a wild beast — a tanner's raw stock.

feathers.name: Bundle of Feathers
feathers.description: Fletching for arrows, or a soft bed.

rucksack.name: Rucksack
rucksack.description: A sturdy leather pack — room for a good deal more.

explorers_pack.name: Explorer's Pack
explorers_pack.description: A well-made pack of many pockets and straps.

bottomless_bag.name: Bottomless Bag
bottomless_bag.description: Its inside is far larger than its outside — an enchanter's marvel.

quiver.name: Quiver
quiver.description: A hip quiver — keeps arrows and bolts close, off your back.

beastlord_totem.name: Beastlord's Totem
beastlord_totem.description: A bone totem that lets even the unmagical take a wolf's shape for a time.

cursed_toadstone.name: Cursed Toadstone
cursed_toadstone.description: A cold green stone. The moment you grasp it, a witch's hex takes hold — and there is no letting go until the curse is lifted.

hags_hexstone.name: Hag's Hexstone
hags_hexstone.description: A knuckle of black bone. Handle it and a hag's curse leaves you a frog — for a while.
